findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Find hardcoded 30x HTTP codes
 * @description Finds all hardcoded 30x HTTP redirect status codes
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity recommendation
 * @id py/find-hardcoded-30x-codes
 * @tags security
 *       http
 *       redirect
 *       status-codes
 */

import python

from IntegerLiteral n
where
  n.getValue() in [300, 301, 302, 303, 304, 305, 306, 307, 308]
select n, "Hardcoded 30x HTTP code found: " + n.getValue().toString()
findings.hypothesis: Find all hardcoded 30x HTTP redirect status codes to identify redirect handling logic

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Find hardcoded GET or POST verbs
 * @description Finds all hardcoded HTTP GET and POST method strings
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity recommendation
 * @id py/find-hardcoded-http-verbs
 * @tags security
 *       http
 *       methods
 *       verbs
 */

import python

from StrConst s
where
  s.getText() = "GET" or s.getText() = "POST"
select s, "Hardcoded HTTP verb found: " + s.getText()
findings.hypothesis: Find locations where HTTP methods GET and POST are hardcoded to understand method transition logic

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Find method reassignments in redirect context
 * @description Finds assignments to method variable that may occur during redirect handling
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity warning
 * @id py/method-reassignment-redirect
 * @tags security
 *       http
 *       redirect
 */

import python

from AssignStmt assign, Name target, StrConst value
where
  target = assign.getATarget() and
  target.getId() = "method" and
  value = assign.getValue() and
  value.getText() in ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE", "HEAD", "OPTIONS", "PATCH"]
select assign, "Method reassignment to: " + value.getText() + " at line " + assign.getLocation().getStartLine().toString()
findings.hypothesis: Find all method reassignments to understand where HTTP methods are being changed during request processing, particularly in redirect scenarios

message.text: Method reassignment to: GET at line 201
Method reassignment to: GET at line 846
Method reassignment to: GET at line 387

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Body variable assignments in redirect context
 * @description Find assignments to body-related variables that may occur during redirect handling
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity recommendation
 * @id py/body-assignment-redirect
 * @tags security
 *       http
 *       redirect
 *       body
 */

import python

from AssignStmt assign, Name target
where
  target = assign.getATarget() and
  (
    target.getId() = "body" or
    target.getId() = "request_body" or
    target.getId().matches("%body%")
  )
select assign, "Body-related assignment: " + target.getId() + " at line " + assign.getLocation().getStartLine().toString()
findings.hypothesis: Find body variable assignments that may be involved in redirect handling to understand if request bodies are preserved or stripped

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Find redirect handling with status code checks
 * @description Finds functions that handle redirects by checking status codes
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity warning
 * @id py/redirect-status-check
 * @tags security
 *       http
 *       redirect
 */

import python

from Compare cmp, IntegerLiteral lit
where
  lit.getValue() in [301, 302, 303, 307, 308] and
  cmp.getASubExpression() = lit
select cmp, "Redirect status code comparison: " + lit.getValue().toString()
findings.hypothesis: Find comparison operations that check for redirect status codes to understand redirect handling logic

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Find redirect handling functions with body parameter
 * @description Finds functions that handle redirects and have a body parameter
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity warning
 * @id py/redirect-body-handling
 * @tags security
 *       http
 *       redirect
 */

import python

from Function f, Parameter p
where
  p = f.getAnArg() and
  p.getName() = "body" and
  exists(Compare cmp, IntegerLiteral lit |
    cmp.getScope() = f and
    lit.getValue() in [301, 302, 303, 307, 308] and
    cmp.getASubExpression() = lit
  )
select f, "Function " + f.getName() + " handles redirects and has body parameter"
findings.hypothesis: Find functions that handle HTTP redirects (checking 301, 302, 303, 307, 308 status codes) and have a body parameter, to identify where request body handling during redirects occurs

message.text: Function urlopen handles redirects and has body parameter
Function urlopen handles redirects and has body parameter

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Request headers preserved during redirect
 * @description Checks if request headers are preserved during redirects which could leak sensitive data
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity warning
 * @id py/headers-preserved-redirect
 * @tags security
 *       http
 *       redirect
 *       cwe-200
 */

import python

from If ifstmt, Compare cmp, IntegerLiteral lit, Name headerVar
where
  lit.getValue() in [301, 302, 303, 307, 308] and
  cmp.getASubExpression() = lit and
  ifstmt.getTest() = cmp and
  headerVar.getId() = "headers" and
  headerVar.getScope() = ifstmt.getScope()
select ifstmt, "Redirect handling at status " + lit.getValue().toString() + " may preserve headers"
findings.hypothesis: Check if sensitive headers are preserved during HTTP redirects

message.text: Redirect handling at status 303 may preserve headers
Redirect handling at status 303 may preserve headers
Redirect handling at status 303 may preserve headers

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Body preserved during 303 redirect with method change to GET
 * @description Detects if request body is preserved when method changes to GET during 303 redirect
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id py/body-preserved-303-redirect
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-200
 *       http
 *       redirect
 */

import python

from If ifstmt, Compare cmp, IntegerLiteral lit, Assign assign1, Assign assign2
where
  // Find if statement checking for status 303
  ifstmt.getTest() = cmp and
  cmp.getASubExpression() = lit and
  lit.getValue() = 303 and
  // Find method assignment to GET in the if body
  assign1.getScope() = ifstmt.getScope() and
  assign1.getATarget().(Name).getId() = "method" and
  exists(StrConst s | s = assign1.getValue() and s.getText() = "GET") and
  // Check if body is NOT set to None in the same block
  not exists(Assign bodyAssign |
    bodyAssign.getScope() = ifstmt.getScope() and
    bodyAssign.getATarget().(Name).getId() = "body" and
    bodyAssign.getValue() instanceof None
  )
select ifstmt, "303 redirect changes method to GET but may not strip request body, potentially leaking sensitive data"
findings.hypothesis: When a 303 redirect occurs, the method is changed to GET but the request body may not be stripped, potentially causing sensitive POST data to be sent in the redirect

message.text: 303 redirect changes method to GET but may not strip request body, potentially leaking sensitive data
303 redirect changes method to GET but may not strip request body, potentially leaking sensitive data
303 redirect changes method to GET but may not strip request body, potentially leaking sensitive data

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Request body preserved during 303 redirect to GET
 * @description When a 303 redirect changes POST to GET, the request body should be stripped but may be preserved, leaking sensitive data
 * @kind path-problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id py/body-leak-303-redirect
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-200
 */

import python
import semmle.python.dataflow.new.DataFlow
import semmle.python.dataflow.new.TaintTracking

module BodyPreservedConfig implements DataFlow::ConfigSig {
  predicate isSource(DataFlow::Node source) {
    exists(Function f, Parameter p |
      p = f.getAnArg() and
      p.getName() = "body" and
      source.asExpr().(Name).getId() = "body" and
      source.getScope() = f
    )
  }

  predicate isSink(DataFlow::Node sink) {
    exists(Call call, Compare cmp, IntegerLiteral lit |
      lit.getValue() = 303 and
      cmp.getASubExpression() = lit and
      cmp.getScope() = call.getScope() and
      sink.asExpr() = call.getAnArg() and
      call.getFunc().(Attribute).getName() in ["urlopen", "request"]
    )
  }
}

module BodyPreservedFlow = TaintTracking::Global<BodyPreservedConfig>;
import BodyPreservedFlow::PathGraph

from BodyPreservedFlow::PathNode source, BodyPreservedFlow::PathNode sink
where BodyPreservedFlow::flowPath(source, sink)
select sink.getNode(), source, sink, "Request body from $@ may be preserved during 303 redirect to GET method.", source.getNode(), "body parameter"
findings.hypothesis: Request body is preserved when POST request receives 303 redirect and changes to GET, potentially leaking sensitive data to redirect location
